passages.title: Reading Passage 1
passages.content: <!-- TODO: replace with the real Cambridge IELTS 17 Reading Test 01 Passage 1 text. The uploader only requires non-empty passage content for the schema and the editor; the actual passage text is not used by the first test. -->

questions.instruction: Questions 1-6. Complete the notes below. Choose ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.
questions.content: 1 The {population} of London increased rapidly between 1800 and 1850.

questions.instruction: Questions 1-6. Complete the notes below. Choose ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.
questions.content: 2 Many people moved out to the {suburbs} in search of better housing.

questions.instruction: Questions 1-6. Complete the notes below. Choose ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.
questions.content: 3 The expansion was driven by {businessmen} investing in property.

questions.instruction: Questions 1-6. Complete the notes below. Choose ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.
questions.content: 4 The growth of the railways was supported by private {funding}.

questions.instruction: Questions 1-6. Complete the notes below. Choose ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.
questions.content: 5 Stories about life underground were popular in the {press}.

questions.instruction: Questions 1-6. Complete the notes below. Choose ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.
questions.content: 6 Engineers had to take into account the type of {soil} when building the tunnels.

questions.instruction: Questions 7-13. Do the following statements agree with the information in the passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.content: 7 Other countries had built underground railways before the Metropolitan line opened.

questions.instruction: Questions 7-13. Do the following statements agree with the information in the passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.content: 8 The author mentions a specific date when the first deep-level tunnel was completed.

questions.instruction: Questions 7-13. Do the following statements agree with the information in the passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.content: 9 The Metropolitan line was originally operated using steam-powered trains.

questions.instruction: Questions 7-13. Do the following statements agree with the information in the passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.content: 10 Workers building the early tunnels often suffered from poor health.

questions.instruction: Questions 7-13. Do the following statements agree with the information in the passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.content: 11 The first underground railway was built outside of London.

questions.instruction: Questions 7-13. Do the following statements agree with the information in the passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.content: 12 All of the original Metropolitan line stations are still in use today.

questions.instruction: Questions 7-13. Do the following statements agree with the information in the passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.content: 13 The author predicts that the cost of underground travel will continue to rise.
